description: Possessed by the Ghost Rider, Mack seeks out Chinatown gang members for vengeance at their warehouse. Daisy struggles to keep up and stop him. Robbie, still partially between worlds, tries to help guide Daisy, but feels helpless. Mack threatens a gang member, with internal struggle manifested as Robbie tries to confront the entity controlling his friend. Daisy attempts to intervene, but the Ghost Rider's will is overpowering.

transcript.line: Well, this looks like the place.
It's not ideal, but Mack, he has a lot of pain. He lost hope. I could survive off his pain for years. I know where you're being dragged down to. I've escaped it before.
Mack... You need to come with me.
I'm never going back.
Please be careful with my baby. No, no. No, no.
It heals itself. Scientifically impossible self-healing car.
That only works when I'm the Rider.
Come on, you're gonna let that stop you? Daisy, we have to catch him, okay? Mack can't control that thing.
This isn't over.
Attagirl. That's more like it.
Move, move. Damn it!
I'm running out of time. The Chinatown guys have a warehouse not far from here. Just go left, Daisy. Daisy, go left! Turn left! Turn left!
Robbie?
Oh, I love this car. Now go! Go!
I think you were right about us being pulled to the other side. The darkness is closing in around us.
Why did he stop reading the book?
You have to read it.
Because he's smart. That book is too dangerous to use. It should be locked up or burnt.
Oh, come on! That's defeatist.
Excuse me?
It's surrender. It's a death sentence. I'm not gonna do it to Simmons. Science can solve this. Science can solve this. Human mind. Oh, I am so thick. AIDA. AIDA, read the book.
What are you doing?
She can process it better than anyone. AIDA. Listen to me. Listen to me. Just understand what I'm saying, please. They can't hear me. Maybe you can.
Fitz, Radcliffe just said it himself. The human brain can't handle that book.
Yeah, well, she's not human. AIDA, the book. Read the book. Read the book!
Perhaps I could read the book.
Huh. I'm sorry. What did you mean... “not human?”
Because Radcliffe and I built her, okay? Her mind can't be corrupted because it's just programming. She's a perfect fit.
She's a robot?
An android. She can handle a quadrillion functions per second, and she can get us home.
Fitz, that was not your call to make.
Absolutely, it is. Whose is it? It's not yours. You're not the director anymore. I have just as much say in this as you do.
What are you so angry about?
Because you used to make decisions like that all the time, and then you stepped down.
I did what was best for S.H.I.E.L.D.
Everybody is trying to do their best to prevent another tragedy... like Lincoln. For you and Daisy, that meant throwing in the towel, but we built AIDA to protect agents like him.

I didn't throw in the towel. I ran an illegal spy agency using powered operatives on American soil. Do you think the President loved that about me? I had to step down so that you could all continue in S.H.I.E.L.D.
You handed it over to a director who betrayed Simmons! He sent her off, God knows where! We were having an argument. Now she's out there, alone, and I'm gone.
Listen to me. He would never hurt her. Everything's gonna be all right. We're gonna make sure of that.
All right, well, I need you in this fight, 'cause I got to get back to her.
I'm in this fight.
I hope I've done the right thing.
The pages are blank.
Not to her.
Okay.
Thank you. Thank you. It's nice to meet you, Jemma Simmons.
Yeah, of course. What's your name? Aah! Aah!
Jemma. Jemma!
Thank you, Doctor. I think we're finished here.
Jemma.
On your left. Fair enough. I can't help you. Have fun.
Please. I already told you where he is. What else do you want from me?
I want you to pay... with your life.
Hey! Mack.
No. You're smarter than that.
You.
I've been a voice in your head all these years. Now, finally, we get to speak face-to-face.
I've wanted you gone. But our work isn't done. Eli is out there. We need to stop him.
“We?” There is no we. Your time is over.
No, no, no. Please, don't kill me!
Stay.
We had a deal. You still owe me vengeance.
Your neighborhood is soaked in the blood I spilled for you.
None of that matters if I don't take down the monster behind all of this. Eli. He's my blood.
He will meet me, too.
